modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Request to add a new article or service to Coyote One Stop

full_description_text:  
During a call, the user asked how to add a new article or service to Coyote One Stop. They mentioned searching the Knowledge Base but couldn't find the information they needed. They really want to request that new information be added so they can get the help they need.
short_description: Request to add a new article or service to Coyote One Stop
description: During a call, the user asked how to add a new article or service to Coyote One Stop. They mentioned searching the Knowledge Base but couldn't find the information they needed. They really want to request that new information be added so they can get the help they need.
